sentences.arabic: كَانَ وَلَدٌ اسْمُهُ كَرِيمٌ يَكْرَهُ أَكْلَ الْخُضَرِ.
sentences.translation: Bio je dječak po imenu Karim koji je mrzio jesti povrće.
sentences.translationEn: There was a boy named Karim who hated eating vegetables.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتِ الْأُمُّ أَنْ يَزْرَعَا الْخَضَرَاوَاتِ مَعًا فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je odlučila da zajedno posade povrće u vrtu.
sentences.translationEn: His mother decided they would grow vegetables together in the garden.

sentences.arabic: زَرَعَ كَرِيمٌ الطَّمَاطِمَ وَسَقَاهَا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ بِاهْتِمَامٍ.
sentences.translation: Karim je posadio paradajz i svaki dan ga zalijeva s pažnjom.
sentences.translationEn: Karim planted tomatoes and watered them carefully every day.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ نَضِجَتِ الطَّمَاطِمُ أَكَلَهَا بِفَرَحٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Kada je paradajz sazrio, pojeo ga je s velikom radošću.
sentences.translationEn: When the tomatoes ripened, he ate them with great joy.
